class.name: Hunter
class.description: Respect the forest and her children, and she will bestow upon you many gifts. Long before the first stones of the grand kingdoms had been laid, there was The Wild. We Hunters called groves and fields home, just as the elk and boar still do. We have trained our minds and hearts as much as we have trained with bows. For, there is great danger in becoming a Hunter: the intoxicating Thrill of the Hunt that washes over your body when stalking prey. Be warned—do not allow it to settle into your heart. For no true Hunter takes without recognizing what they have first been given: a soul, a meal… warmth, all at a cost—a life. And that should not be taken lightly. Wherever you roam, be it city or glade, mountain or valley, as long as The Wild is tenderly tucked into the depths of your heart, you will always be a Hunter. May your arrows strike true and your bowstrings never break. •Relentless Tracker. As an expert survivalist, you mark your prey, becoming a shadow in pursuit, relentless and precise. •Master of the Wild. Harness the Thrill of the Hunt to outwit your targets—set decoys, spring traps, and strike with lethal efficiency. •From Afar or Up Close. Whether you’re raining arrows from a distance or closing in for a personal takedown, your prey won’t escape your reach.

progression.name: Hunter’s Mark
progression.description: Action: A creature you can see is marked as your quarry for 1 day (or until you mark another creature). It can’t be hidden from you, and your attacks against it gain your choice of advantage OR +LVL damage (choose before each attack).

progression.name: Forager
progression.description: Gain advantage on skill checks to find food and water in the wild.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt
progression.description: Choose 2 Thrill of the Hunt (TotH) abilities. Gain a charge to use these abilities during that encounter whenever: • Your quarry dies. • You hit your quarry in melee or crit your quarry at range.

progression.name: Roll & Strike
progression.description: Action: If you have no Thrill of the Hunt charges, move up to your speed toward your quarry. If you end adjacent to them, make a melee attack against them for free.

progression.name: Remember the Wild
progression.description: Whenever you spend a day in the wilderness during a Safe Rest, you may choose different Hunter options available to you.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Choose a Hunter subclass.

progression.name: Tracker’s Intuition
progression.description: You can discern the events of a past encounter by studying tracks and other subtle environmental clues, accurately determining the kind and amount of creatures, their direction, key actions, and passage of time.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (2)
progression.description: Choose a 3rd Thrill of the Hunt ability.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.

progression.name: Explorer of the Wilds
progression.description: +2 speed; gain a climbing speed.

progression.name: Hunter's Resolve
progression.description: Whenever you have no Thrill of the Hunt charges, gain Hunter's Resolve until the end of your turn: treat all creatures as your quarry for the purposes of movement and melee attacks.

progression.name: Final Takedown
progression.description: Action: Spend 1 Thrill of the Hunt charge to make a melee attack against your Bloodied quarry. Turn it into a crit and double the damage of your Hunter’s Mark. If they survive, they crit you back.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.

progression.name: Versatile Bowmaster
progression.description: Whenever you attack with a Longbow, you may roll 2d4 instead of 1d8; or with a Crossbow, 2d8 instead of 4d4.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (3)
progression.description: Choose a 4th Thrill of the Hunt ability.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Hunter subclass feature.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (4)
progression.description: Choose a 5th Thrill of the Hunt ability.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.

progression.name: No Escape
progression.description: Whenever you see one or more allies make an opportunity attack, you may also make a ranged opportunity attack against the same target.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.

progression.name: Veteran Stalker
progression.description: Gain a Thrill of the Hunt charge whenever you are first Bloodied in an encounter and for every Wound you gain.

progression.name: Keen Eye, Steady Hand
progression.description: Add WIL to your ranged weapon damage.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Hunter subclass feature.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (5)
progression.description: Choose a 6th Thrill of the Hunt ability.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.

progression.name: Keen Sight
progression.description: Advantage on Perception checks.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (6)
progression.description: Choose a 7th Thrill of the Hunt ability.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Hunter subclass feature.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.

progression.name: Peerless Hunter
progression.description: You can Defend against your quarry for free.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.

progression.name: Wild Endurance
progression.description: Gain 1 Thrill of the Hunt charge at the start of your turns.

progression.name: Epic Boon
progression.description: Choose an Epic Boon (see pg. 23 of the GM's Guide).

progression.name: Nemesis
progression.description: +1 to any 2 of your stats. Your Hunter’s Mark can target any number of creatures simultaneously.

progression.name: Ambusher
progression.description: When you roll Initiative, you may use Hunter’s Mark for free. Gain advantage on the first attack you make each encounter.

progression.name: Skilled Tracker
progression.description: You have advantage on skill checks to track creatures.

progression.name: Skilled Navigator
progression.description: You cannot become lost by nonmagical means.

progression.name: Primal Predator
progression.description: (1/encounter) Your weapon attacks ignore cover and armor this turn.

progression.name: Pack Hunter
progression.description: Whenever you mark a creature, you may also mark another creature within 6 spaces of them for free.

progression.name: Apex Predator
progression.description: You may use your Primal Predator ability twice each encounter. Gain 1 Thrill of the Hunt charge when you roll Initiative.

progression.name: Impressive Form
progression.description: +5 max HP. Upgrade your Hit Dice to d10s.

progression.name: I Have the High Ground
progression.description: When you roll Initiative or gain one or more Thrill of the Hunt charges, move up to half your speed for free, ignoring difficult terrain.

progression.name: Resourceful Herbalist
progression.description: Whenever you Safe Rest in a location near where plants or fungi can grow, you may spend a day collecting healing herbs to craft a number of Healing Salves equal to your WIL.

progression.name: Healing Salve
progression.description: Action: Heal yourself or an adjacent creature WIL d6 HP. Only you or another experienced Herbalist may administer these, and they expire whenever you Safe Rest.

progression.name: Ha! I’m Over Here!
progression.description: Ha! I’m Over Here! (1/Safe Rest) If an attack would cause you to drop to 0 HP, you instead move up to your speed away and take no damage.

progression.name: Unparalleled Survivalist. Gain +WIL armor
progression.description: When you attack with a ranged weapon, you may first move half your speed for free.
